\tzpentry{ID3903}{Uncoupled Kaluza-Klein Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3903 introduces Uncoupled Kaluza-Klein Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[
$m_{KK}^{(i)} \leftarrow \Solve\left[\omega_i - \omega_{\text{uncoupled}}(n_i,l_i,m_i) = \frac{m_{KK} c}{R_{KK}}\right]$
\]
